title: Boy (4) assaulted with brick
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The KwaNonqaba Police are investigating a case of assault with the intention to cause grievous bodily harm after a four-year-old boy was hit with a brick in Mayekiso Street, KwaNonqaba, last Friday afternoon, 26 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The KwaNonqaba Police are investigating a case of assault with the intention to cause grievous bodily harm after a four-year-old boy was hit with a brick in Mayekiso Street, KwaNonqaba, last Friday afternoon, 26 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, the KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, the child’s mother was indoors when some children called to her from outside that her son had been hit with a brick."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She rushed outside and found her son with his face covered in blood. The suspect fled the scene. It is unclear who they are or what their motive for the assault was.","html":"She rushed outside and found her son with his face covered in blood. The suspect fled the scene. It is unclear who they are or what their motive for the assault was."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It has been reported that the boy had sustained a wound to his forehead and is recovering at home.","html":"It has been reported that the boy had sustained a wound to his forehead and is recovering at home."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No arrests have been made at this stage. Should anyone have any information about the incident, contact the investigating officer, Constable Makhosonke Dyiba, on 044 606 5619.","html":"No arrests have been made at this stage. Should anyone have any information about the incident, contact the investigating officer, Constable Makhosonke Dyiba, on 044 606 5619."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
